mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTANNUALDETAIL01 ( COMPANY, YYYY, EMP_CODE, DEPT_CODE, ANNUAL_START_DATE, ANNUAL_END_DATE, TOTAL_WORK_DAY, REAL_WORK_DAY, TOT_DAY, USE_DAY, BALANCE_DAY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) SELECT h.COMPANY, #{yyyy}, h.EMP_CODE, h.DEPT_CODE, DATEFROMPARTS(#{yyyy}, 1, 1), DATEFROMPARTS(#{yyyy}, 12, 31), 365, 365, 20, 0, 20, GETDATE(), GETDATE() FROM HRIMASTER01 h WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTANNUALDETAIL01 ad WHERE ad.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND ad.YYYY = #{yyyy} AND ad.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE )
